text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"The Spring Tenno Sho Throwdown!"
"Kitasan Black vs. Satono Diamond!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Two Childhood Friends Duke It Out!"
"Who Will the Goddess of Victory Smile Upon?!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of these spring Tenno Sho articles feature
dramatic headlines about the "throwdown
between the two titans."

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Those two couldn't be more different, so seeing
them face off ought to be something special.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond was popular and highly
regarded even before her debut. They called her
the "230-Million-Point Scion."

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Kitasan Black wasn't very well
known at first, but reached the top by winning
over the hearts of fans with guts and dedication.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
And they're even childhood friends, right? It's like
they were destined to face off here!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
But Kitasan Black might have the advantage
today. She won last year, after all.

text_block_list.name: Spectacled Man
text_block_list.text:
At 3,200 meters, the spring Tenno Sho is the
longest of any G1 race. The Yodo Slope features
large changes in elevation, so positioning and
endurance are key.

text_block_list.name: Man in Hoodie
text_block_list.text: What's with the sudden analysis?

text_block_list.name: Spectacled Man
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black competed here last year, so she has
an advantage in that respect. ...Hm, I feel like
we've had a conversation like this before.

text_block_list.name: Man in Hoodie
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, right! When Mejiro McQueen took on Tokai
Teio here!

text_block_list.name: Spectacled Man
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I remember now. This situation is certainly
similar...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hah, I knew it! Even everyone else thinks their
showdown is just like ours was back then!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Those two looked up to us, and now they're
running in the very same race...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I feel a strange twist of fate is at play here.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
They watched our race in the past, so hopefully
they can put on an even better performance than
we did!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. At the very least, they should be
comparable to how we were at the time.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The throwdown between two titans...
I'm glad I can play a part in fueling the
excitement.
choice_data_list: That's a very "you" way of looking at it.
That's a very "you" way of looking at it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm contributing to the Umamusume world
from within. It's something the Satono family has
never accomplished before.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm thankful to everyone who's been interviewing
me since even before my debut.
choice_data_list: It's because you're always so sincere...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I also have Kita to thank. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
All this attention she's receiving is the result of
how hard she's worked to bring smiles and
excitement to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
By running with her, I truly believe that I'll find
out what it means to be an illustrious
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But to do that, I'll need to win this race first.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita may hold the advantage of having run in the
spring Tenno Sho last year, but that'll just make
my win today all the more meaningful.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win this race and become an
Umamusume whose talent nobody can question!
